positive: Minimalist celestial fox spirit sitting gracefully amongst glowing bioluminescent flora. The fox should have a flowing, ethereal silhouette with shades of deep indigo and soft gold. The scene is set against a deep cosmic gradient background transitioning from midnight blue to violet. Emphasize strong line work, clean separation of elements, and a high contrast between the bright glowing flowers and the dark background. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau tattoo design meets Japanese sumi-e ink painting, hyper-detailed, vector illustration quality, central composition, optimized for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, low detail, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, logos, trademarks, copyrights, characters, realistic photography, solid background, ugly, boring
